name: create_note
description: Create a new Google Keep text note or checklist, optionally with labels and pinning.

text.description: The body text of the note. Used when creating a text note (i.e. when items is not provided).

items.description: Newline-separated checklist items. When provided, a checklist is created instead of a text note.

labels.description: Comma-separated label names to apply to the note. Labels that do not exist are silently skipped.
